rootCause: The broad quest completable-items coverage allowed BETA_PLACEHOLDER inventory exemptions to stand in for market availability, and there was no focused regression ensuring the hand-crank generator quest had at least one obtainable source for each critical required item.
resolution: Add a targeted regression in questCompletableItems to assert that energy/hand-crank-generator critical requirements are obtainable via price, process outputs, or quest rewards, and assign a real inventory price to the required 12 V DC motor so it is tradeable.
